Job Title: GenAI / AI/ML Engineer

Experience: 4-12 Years Location: Koramangala, Bangalore / Technopark, Trivandrum Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are seeking a Python Developer with strong backend engineering expertise and hands-on exposure to Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning to design, build, and scale AI-driven applications. The role involves developing production-grade AI solutions leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs), deep learning models, and cloud AI services across cloud or on-premises environments.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and integrate LLM-based solutions (e.g., OpenAI GPT, LLaMA, HuggingFace models) into enterprise products and workflows
  • Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, embeddings, chunking strategies, and fine-tuning for business use cases
  • Develop APIs and integration layers to connect AI models with frontend and backend systems
  • Build scalable backend applications using Python with microservices architecture
  • Design RESTful APIs using FastAPI (mandatory), Flask, or Django
  • Develop Agentic AI workflows including multi-agent coordination, tool/function calling, memory handling, and workflow orchestration
  • Integrate AI models into applications using APIs and ensure secure communication
  • Collaborate with frontend (Flutter) and backend (Node.js/Python) teams for AI feature deployment
  • Test, debug, and manage API integrations using tools like cURL
  • Deploy AI services on AWS (Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2, ECS/EKS, DynamoDB, RDS)
  • Leverage Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker for model deployment, orchestration, and scaling
  • Develop and integrate ML/DL models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn
  • Work on NLP, classification, regression, clustering, anomaly detection, and time-series modeling
  • Build scalable data pipelines for training, validation, and inference
  • Ensure systems are secure, scalable, cost-optimized, and production-ready with monitoring
  • Implement DevOps and MLOps best practices (CI/CD, model versioning, logging)
  • Collaborate with product teams to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions
  • Contribute to architecture design and continuous improvement of AI platforms

Required Technical Skills

LLM & AI Integration (Mandatory)

  • Hands-on experience with LLMs and Generative AI systems
  • Integration of OpenAI GPT, LLaMA, HuggingFace models into real-world applications
  • Experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, LangGraph, ADK
  • Vector databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus, FAISS, OpenSearch
  • RAG pipelines, embeddings-based retrieval, and prompt engineering workflows
  • API integration of AI models into production systems

Programming & Frameworks

  • Python for backend, data processing, and AI/ML integration
  • FastAPI (mandatory), Flask, Django for API development
  • Basic Node.js for backend integration
  • Basic Flutter for frontend AI API support
  • cURL for API testing and debugging

Machine Learning & Deep Learning

  • Solid understanding of ML/DL concepts
  • Experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, scikit-learn
  • NLP, neural networks, and modern AI architectures
  • Model training, validation, optimization, and deployment

Data & Database Technologies

  • Relational databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL
  • NoSQL/vector databases: MongoDB, Pinecone, OpenSearch
  • Data tools: Pandas, NumPy
  • Big data tools: Spark, Hadoop (optional)

Cloud & DevOps

  • AWS services: Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2, ECS/EKS, DynamoDB, RDS
  • Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker (preferred)
  • Docker, Kubernetes for containerization
  • CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices
  • Security: IAM, VPC, encryption

Preferred Skills

  • Microservices architecture and distributed systems
  • API design, software architecture, scalable system design
  • Problem-solving, analytical thinking, debugging
  • End-to-end AI system development
  • Performance optimization, scalability, cost trade-offs
  • Cross-functional communication
  • AI-driven process improvement
  • Awareness of emerging technologies

Good to Have

  • Agentic AI systems and workflow automation
  • Graph RAG and knowledge graph-based retrieval
  • Prompt optimization, LLM fine-tuning, model evaluation
  • Production deployment of AI/ML/GenAI solutions
  • Multi-cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  • Financial/enterprise domain systems
  • Distributed systems, Snowflake, large-scale data platforms
summary: A GenAI/AI/ML Engineer role requiring Python backend expertise and hands-on experience in building scalable AI systems with LLMs, ML/DL models, and cloud integration.

Job Summary

Oracle Database Administrator (Cloud) – responsible for managing, securing, and optimizing Oracle databases in cloud and hybrid environments with a focus on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Key Responsibilities

Cloud Database Administration (OCI-Focused) - Provision, configure, and manage Oracle Databases on OCI (Autonomous Database, DBCS, Exadata Cloud) - Manage Single Instance, RAC, CDB/PDB architectures - Perform database lifecycle management (provisioning, scaling, cloning, patching)

Hybrid & Migration Responsibilities - Support hybrid environments (on-prem + OCI) - Execute migrations using RMAN, Data Pump, OCI Migration Service, Goldengate - Validate post-migration performance and functionality

High Availability, DR & Resilience - Design and manage OCI Data Guard, automated backups, cross-region DR - Perform recovery testing and rolling upgrades

Performance & Cost Optimization - Monitor/tune databases using OCI Console, AWR/ADDM/ASH - Optimize storage, compute shapes, licensing, and FinOps

Security, Compliance & Governance - Implement IAM policies, network security, encryption (TDE, OCI Vault) - Manage access controls, auditing, compliance (ISO, SOX, GDPR)

Automation & DevOps Enablement - Automate operations with Shell, SQL/PLSQL, OCI CLI/SDK, Terraform/Ansible - Integrate CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code

Monitoring & Incident Management - Set up proactive monitoring, alerts, and dashboards - Troubleshoot cloud-specific issues; participate in 24x7 on-call rotations

Documentation & Collaboration - Maintain architecture diagrams and runbooks - Collaborate with cloud architects, DevOps, application teams, and security teams

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in CS/IT
  • Preferred certifications: OCI Architect/DBA, OCP, Exadata/Performance/Security

Soft Skills

  • Cloud troubleshooting mindset
  • Automation-first approach
  • Clear communication
  • Fast-paced environment adaptability

Experience Levels

  • Mid-Level: 4–7 years (1–2 years cloud exposure)

About MPT

Muthoot Pappachan Technologies (MPT) is the IT division of Muthoot Pappachan Group, providing cutting-edge IT solutions including cloud, ERP, application development, and infrastructure management. Based at Technopark, Trivandrum, MPT serves both internal and external clients globally.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills - Oracle Database (12c/18c/19c/21c) - Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) - RMAN, Data Guard, ASM, RAC, Multitenant (CDB/PDB) - SQL/PLSQL, Linux administration, performance tuning

Cloud-Specific Skills - OCI IAM, networking, storage - Autonomous Database administration - Cloud security, encryption, cost optimization - IaC tools (Terraform preferred)

Preferred Skills - Oracle Golden Gate - Exadata Cloud Service - Multi-cloud exposure (AWS RDS/Aurora, Azure SQL) - Kubernetes, ITIL/SRE, DevSecOps

Working Location: Trivandrum, Kerala
